speaker: speaker1
text: Good day ! Welcome to Lincoln Bank , how may we assist you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Hello . I need to find out if a Receipt of Proceeds has arrived . I'm from Felix Wasserman Associates .

speaker: speaker1
text: Thanks . Have you got the L / C number ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Hang on a tick and I'll check for you . I'm sorry ; we have no record of that arriving .

speaker: speaker2
text: OK , thanks for checking . Could you give me a ring when it arrives , please ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No problem . I'll be in touch as soon as it comes in .
